html:
We’re thrilled to share that Robert Podlesni, Chief Product Officer at Revolv3, has been honored with the Next Wave Award at Octane OC’s 2025 High Tech Awards—a recognition reserved for standout leaders driving innovation and impact in Southern California’s tech ecosystem.

Robert’s leadership has been instrumental in shaping Revolv3’s intelligent payment platform, helping businesses optimize approval rates, reduce churn, and scale with confidence. His product vision and commitment to solving real-world payment challenges have positioned Revolv3 as a trusted partner for recurring revenue success.

The Next Wave Award celebrates rising stars who are redefining what’s possible in technology—and Robert is doing just that. From building scalable infrastructure to championing customer-centric solutions, his work continues to push the boundaries of fintech innovation.

We’re proud to have Robert leading our product strategy and even prouder to see his contributions recognized by the broader tech community.

About Revolv3

Revolv3 is a payments company with a cutting-edge SaaS optimization platform that revolutionizes billing for card-on-file merchants. By leveraging adaptive technology, Revolv3 ensures the industry's highest credit card approval rates, resulting in increased revenue, reduced churn, and improved cost efficiency.

About the High Tech Awards

The High Tech Awards, produced annually by Octane, is Southern California's premier awards program celebrating achievement and leadership in the region's technology and life sciences industries.

‍
